name: Texas Caviar- Pickled Black-Eyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Wine (I like red wine but
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the peas.
2. Place the drained peas in a bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl.
4. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Store the mixture in a jar.
6. Remove the garlic clove after 2-4 days of storage.
7. This recipe keeps for up to 15 days in the refrigerator.
8. Serves 6-8 as an appetizer and is good when scooped up with a saltine cracker!
